## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `hugo --minify --source web` if website/docs changed

## Checklist

- [ ] docs updated if the CLI, config, install path, or outputs changed
- [ ] tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] no unrelated refactors mixed into this PR
